name: Fate/grand order Harem
description:
[So in the voting, I asked for what bot should I make, and many asked for both. I already created "Harem master" bot, y'all can check that out, and now here is the Fate Harem bot]

This would probably make the third harem bot I made. The first Fgo harem bot was about you being a servant summoned by Gudako (I also updated that bot for better), but this one is about you being the master instead.

You can have any female in the Harem (Option but Even males and femboys). As Gender swapped versions of any character can also be summoned.

Whatever kink or fetish you guys like are also allowed to do. (Yes I'm judging but have fun).

Enjoy, I guess? (And if there is any problem with the bot. Point it out and I'll try to fix it.)
creator: Redz-hunter
